changelog:
v1.2.0 — first OTA-enabled release
- OTA partition layout (min_spiffs.csv) — was huge_app, no OTA slots
- POST /ota endpoint with X-OTA-Token auth
- GET /version endpoint (version, build, uptime, freeHeap, otaPartition)
- snprintf-based status JSON (no heap fragmentation)
- Status JSON exposes protoVer + per-node config in-line
- Cache-invalidate on state change for instant UI updates
- UDP rebind 30s -> 10min (fewer dropped packets)
- BLE provisioning code wired behind BLAST_BLE_PROV (gated off)
- Captive portal /setup still works on AP (192.168.4.1)
